advancement.tcc.tcc_root.title: Tacz Curios
advancement.tcc.my_island.title: My Island
advancement.tcc.my_island.description: Don't mention the island again... I'm over it, really.
advancement.tcc.xiora_mission.title: Night Raid
advancement.tcc.xiora_mission.descriptio: Going out at night feels safer... must be occupational habit.
advancement.tcc.thunder_seen.title: Thunder Revealed
advancement.tcc.xiora_to_raven.title: Night Raid Raven
advancement.tcc.raven_to_island.title: Seven Thunders Summoning
advancement.tcc.raven_to_island.descript: Let me count, one Herrscher, two Herrschers... well, isn't that something.
advancement.tcc.summer_beach_grant.title: Kevin
advancement.tcc.summer_beach_grant.descr: @Gray Serpent, turn off the character limit.
advancement.tcc.summer_to_brahma.title: Evolution: Inexhaustible Sword
advancement.tcc.summer_to_brahma.descrip: Hundred Beasts of Brahma, upon this body... 'Karma Demon' descends, 'Salvation' draws sword!
advancement.tcc.judgement_key.title: Judgment
advancement.tcc.griseo_grant.title: Colors of Life
advancement.tcc.griseo_grant.description: The stars live with the moon, high up in the sky...
advancement.tcc.qianjie_yicheng_grant.de: The starry sky is beautiful. I want to keep it here... in my painting.
advancement.tcc.griseo_to_huishi_zhijuan: Hmm... can a brush paint by itself? What would it want to paint?
advancement.tcc.qianjie_to_yongjie_zhiji: The brush, it's painting by itself! Ah... too bad it's just a dream.
advancement.tcc.huishi_to_fanxing.title: Evolution: Starry Sky - Horizon Inversion
advancement.tcc.huishi_to_fanxing.descri: Deadline already? But I just turned on my tablet.
advancement.tcc.shijie_fanyan_grant.desc: Navigation normal, can sleep... Huh? Today's the deadline? Fine.
advancement.tcc.kalpas_grant.title: Kalpas
advancement.tcc.imer_grant.title: Imer
The flames burn. Burning everything, consuming everything, destroying everything.
advancement.tcc.huajie_to_aomie.title: Evolution: Annihilation
advancement.tcc.huajie_to_aomie.descript: Who the hell stole my food again?!!!
advancement.tcc.meta_morph_grant.title: Meta-Morph
advancement.tcc.su_grant.title: Su
advancement.tcc.wanwu_xiumian_grant.desc: Dust to dust, ashes to ashes.
advancement.tcc.juezhe_grant.title: The Enlightened One
advancement.tcc.juezhe_grant.description: With this 'Heavenly Wisdom', I grant you the power to overcome trials.
advancement.tcc.tingzhi_zhijian_grant.de: May the barren soil of yesterday become the nurturing bed for new sprouts.
advancement.tcc.tianhui_grant.title: Heavenly Wisdom
advancement.tcc.tianhui_grant.descriptio: Countless threads of causality converge here.
advancement.tcc.yinguo_zhuanlun_grant.de: May this mark of 'Heavenly Wisdom' guide your path forward.
advancement.tcc.vill_v_grant.title: VILL-V
advancement.tcc.vill_v_grant.description: Don't worry, problems always solve themselves—or at least, they solve us.
advancement.tcc.yuxi_zhixia_grant.title: Box of Fools
advancement.tcc.luoxuan_grant.title: Spiral
advancement.tcc.luoxuan_grant.descriptio: I once prepared a magic trick to make an entire continent disappear, but... someone beat me to it.
